category_sources: source_facts.description says yek serializes text-based files for LLM consumption; official GitHub README describes serializing files in a repository/directory for LLM consumption.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is yek; official GitHub repository heading and README use 'yek'.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README contains installation, usage examples, CLI reference, configuration, and behavior documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/mohsen1/yek; per instruction repo was not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official GitHub README describe Rust-based serialization of repository files for LLM context with CLI options and gitignore-aware behavior.
